title: Kathie's Kitchen
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
summary: Custom online ordering system that converts orders directly into kitchen preparation tasks with localized logistics.
overview: Kathie's Kitchen is a specialized culinary commerce engine focusing on immediate delivery schedules, ingredient availability updates, and direct-to-courier notifications.
problem: Generic shopping templates failed to handle location-based delivery radius checks and dynamic kitchen capacity limits.
role: Full Stack Developer designing the order matching engine and the kitchen operator dashboard.
solution: Developed a custom geo-fenced cart calculation pipeline, coupled with WebSockets for instantaneous dashboard order updates.
features: Dynamic preparation scheduling limiting orders per 30-minute block
Real-time driver mapping and delivery routing using local road grids
Tailored billing statement generator sending receipts via SMS/Email

technicalDecisions.reason: Provided instant reactive states for customer modifications on the dish customization steps.
Leveraged JSONB fields for customized ingredient selections and spatial queries for distance calculation.

challenges: Handling high volumes of concurrent dinner orders without locking up the kitchen queue screen.
outcomes: Increased daily order capacity by 45% while reducing customer communication overhead via automatic status messages.
